title: Formatter MDX build and v0.3 CI handoff fixes

source.subject: fix(ci): formatter MDX build and v0.3 merge progress handoff

body:
CI builds formatter-related platform-spec MDX without MDX parse failures and records v0.3 merge-progress handoff notes for orchestration.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`f030910`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/f030910)
- **Subject:** fix(ci): formatter MDX build and v0.3 merge progress handoff
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-post-merge-ci`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **CI and integration hardening** (`v03-post-merge-ci`).
